purpose: Bootstrap module for the docs group; installs pandoc via apt for universal document conversion and markdownlint-cli via npm (user prefix) for markdown linting — supporting both human authors and AI agents that produce documentation.
invariants: pandoc is installed from apt (trixie ships a current version)
markdownlint-cli is installed via npm_global into the user prefix (~/.local/bin) — no sudo
Both tools are independently guarded in docs_record_manifest with has checks
gotchas: markdownlint-cli (npm package) is distinct from markdownlint-cli2 — the binary is 'markdownlint', not 'markdownlint-cli'
pandoc's version in Debian trixie may lag behind upstream releases; heavy format conversions may benefit from the official pandoc release tarball

key_functions.name: docs_install
key_functions.summary: Installs pandoc via apt and markdownlint-cli via npm_global, then records both in the manifest

key_functions.name: docs_record_manifest
key_functions.summary: Upserts manifest entries for pandoc and markdownlint-cli if their binaries are present
